name: xau_atr_breakout_pullback_m5
hypothesis: XAUUSD M5 ATR-breakout levels, when retested within 5 bars after initial break, provide high-RR continuation entries. Expect PF>=1.8 with trade count >= 300. Falsified if retest variant shows no edge over naive breakout.

regime_filter.rule: ATR(14) percentile over last 200 bars > 40 AND ADX(14) > 18
regime_filter.description: Avoid lowest-40% volatility and pure range. Excludes ~55% of bars.

signals.entry_long: price breaks atr_breakout_level_upper (prior_close + 1.5*ATR(14)), then within 5 bars returns within 0.25*ATR of level and closes back above it
signals.session_mask: 06:00-21:00 UTC (exclude Asia thin liquidity and post-NY)

exits.sl: 1.2 * ATR(14) from entry (just beyond retest low/high)

notes: Also emit a trivial always-on baseline counter (every 100th bar) to confirm plumbing per last-gen root-cause recommendation.
